fields.name: Standard Budget Proposal
fields.description:
GOVERNMENT OF INDIA DEPARTMENT OF FINANCE

Ref No: FIN/2024/089 Date: May 12, 2024

SUBJECT: PROPOSAL FOR INFRASTRUCTURE MAINTENANCE BUDGET FY 2024-25

Respectfully submitted to the Department Head, this proposal outlines the required budget of INR 4.5 Crores for the maintenance of government residential complexes.

Breakdown:

Civil Repairs: 2.1 Cr
Electrical Upgrades: 1.4 Cr
Landscape & Security: 1.0 Cr
We have successfully completed the previous year's audit. All supporting receipts are attached.

(Signed) R. Raghavan Senior Officer, Finance

fields.name: Medical Emergency
fields.description:
URGENT MEDICAL LEAVE APPLICATION

Dear Sir,

I am writing to request an emergency leave of 25 days starting immediately.

My father has been admitted to the ICU for emergency heart surgery. I need to be present at the Hospital for his recovery and post-operative care.

Please find the medical reports and hospital admission slips attached as evidence.

Sincerely, S. Kumar Clerk, General Dept.
